1_AIoptionSelection.AIAmount: The amount of AI drivers to spawn.
1_AIoptionSelection.AILevel: The difficulty of the AI, with the hardest being about as fast as you.

A_mapSelection.Shoreline: An average-length map surrounded by water. Best suited for beginners and casual players.
A_mapSelection.Canyon: A long map with elevation changes and cliffs to slip off of. Caution is advised when driving.

B_carSelection.Bansku: Higher top speed, but less turbo. Better for longer maps.
B_carSelection.Sarya: The default experience, balanced in every way. Suitable for everyone.
B_carSelection.Tatato: High turbo and high acceleration make a strong car made for competition.
B_carSelection.Teimo: More speed, but lower turbo capacity. Recommended if you drift a lot.

C_optionSelection.Laps: The amount of laps to drive.
